allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'Instância: {i.get\(\\"instance\\",{}\).get\(\\"instanceName\\",\\"?\\"\)} | Estado: {i.get\(\\"instance\\",{}\).get\(\\"state\\",\\"?\\"\)}'\) for i in data] if isinstance\(data, list\) else print\(data\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; s=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['scripts']; [print\(f'{k}: {v}'\) for k,v in s.items\(\) if any\(x in v for x in ['server','api','node','start','dev']\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(data[:5] if isinstance\(data,list\) else data, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Servidor OK' if d.get\('ok'\) else d\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; print\('OK' if json.load\(sys.stdin\).get\('ok'\) else 'FAIL'\)")
